prompt: Create a cinematic full-body fashion editorial photo of an adult woman dancing dramatically in the middle of a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, arms stretched wide like a runway pose, one leg crossed forward and lifted onto tiptoe. She wears a glossy black leather long trench coat styled like a revealing high-fashion wrap dress with asymmetric cutouts, deep neckline, high slit, belted waist, and wind-swept hem, paired with leopard-print stiletto heels. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular blur while keeping the body, outfit, and environment sharply detailed. The setting is a neon-lit futuristic downtown with wet reflective asphalt, falling rain, motion-blurred pink, cyan, teal, and yellow light trails, glowing billboards, and a sleek dark car directly behind her with headlights on and rain droplets on the windshield. Use a low-angle 35mm fashion-photography perspective, high contrast, glossy reflections, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, vibrant magenta and turquoise color grading, ultra-realistic skin and leather texture, dynamic motion, no readable text, no watermark.
